text: Artificial intelligence is transforming the modern workplace in significant ways. Many routine tasks, such as data entry and scheduling, are increasingly handled through automation, freeing up employees for more creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyse large amounts of information quickly, make better decisions, and manage their time more efficiently. However, rather than replacing humans completely, the most effective approach involves human-AI collaboration, where machines handle repetitive tasks and people focus on strategy and emotional intelligence. As a result, some traditional jobs are changing or disappearing, while new roles are emerging in AI management, ethics, and system design. Adapting to these changes requires continuous learning and flexibility from employees.
